contract_claim: Comment says 'Extract only the dots/progress indicators' but the regex `/[·.xX!*]+/g` also matches 'x', 'X', '!', and '*' which are Vitest failure/skip symbols, not just dots.
observed_behavior: Comment says 'Extract only the dots/progress indicators' but the regex `/[·.xX!*]+/g` also matches 'x', 'X', '!', and '*' which are Vitest failure/skip symbols, not just dots.
